segments.beat: hand holds Arduview upright, transparent shell and active display visible from slight angle
slow pan/rotation showing device front-on; PCB internals and illuminated display clearly legible through clear shell
continued slow rotation revealing side and back; PCB components, solder points, and gold traces visible through resin
device exits frame; brief glimpse of back/side profile
camera pans off device to wooden desk surface; device no longer in frame
single frame — wooden desk only, device fully out of shot

demonstrates.motion_value: high — rotation makes internals readable from multiple angles
high — display actively lit with cyan game text throughout hold
low — hand provides scale reference but no explicit size comparison
medium — gold PCB traces and clear resin visible during rotation
low — display shows text content but no gameplay action visible

selection_note: Strong transparency + live-display proof in first 5s; rotation gives internals credibility; last 3s are dead (desk only) so clip must be trimmed to 0:00-0:05 before use.

aesthetics.standout: teal screen pops against transparent case
aesthetics.weakness: handheld drift + warm flat ambient with wood-grain desk dominating frame
aesthetics.note: device under 40% of frame most shots; no staging, grip hand intrudes; reference only
